src/main/java/com/redhat/developers/Gree.general_idea: Replace hardcoded greeting string with a configurable property injected via MicroProfile Config.
src/main/java/com/redhat/developers/Gree.human_impl: Added @ConfigProperty(name="greeting") field and returned it instead of the literal string.

src/test/java/com/redhat/developers/Gree.general_idea: Update the expected response body in the test to match the new greeting message.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM version to 3.8.1.
Update the Maven compiler plugin version to 3.12.1.
Update the Maven Surefire plugin version to 3.2.5.
Add the Quarkus Kubernetes extension dependency.
Add the Quarkus SmallRye Health extension dependency.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from UBI8 OpenJDK 17 to UBI9 OpenJDK 21 runtime to align with the target Java version.
Remove the explicit HTTP host binding from JAVA_OPTS, likely relying on default behavior or external orchestration configuration.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Bump the UBI8 OpenJDK 17 base image to a newer patch version.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Upgrade the native Docker base image from UBI 8 to UBI 9 to align with the Java 21 runtime environment.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Renamed the application identifier to match the project name.
Added a custom greeting property for the application.
Scoped the OpenTelemetry trace endpoint to the development profile.
Configured the production OpenTelemetry trace endpoint for a specific collector service.
Added configuration for building and pushing container images to Quay.
Added configuration for deploying to Knative with specific scaling and namespace settings.
Added production-specific PostgreSQL datasource configuration including credentials and URL.
Added Hibernate ORM configuration for database schema generation and SQL loading.

src/main/resources/import.sql.general_idea: Replace the initial database seed data from a 'Fruit' domain model to a 'Place' domain model to align with the application's new business logic.
src/main/resources/import.sql.human_impl: Replaced INSERT statements for Fruit (id, name, season) with INSERT statements for Place (id, city, country, month).
